# ⚖️ Description

**Type of Change:**

- [ ] 🚀 Feature
- [ ] 🐛 Bug Fix
- [ ] 🎨 UI/UX Update (Design System)
- [ ] ⚙️ Refactor / Chore
- [ ] 📜 Documentation

## 🛠️ Changes Made

- [ ] **Apps/Web:** - (e.g., Implemented Sign-in page logic)
- [ ] **Packages/UI:** - (e.g., Updated design tokens in globals.css)
- [ ] **Database:** - (e.g., Added new schema via Drizzle ORM)

## 📸 Screenshots / Demos (If applicable)

## ✅ Quality Checklist

- [ ] **Linting:** Code passes `biome check` and conforms to project style.
- [ ] **Type Safety:** No TypeScript errors in `apps/web` or `packages/ui`.
- [ ] **Responsiveness:** UI verified on mobile, tablet, and desktop.
- [ ] **Accessibility:** Components follow ARIA standards.
- [ ] **Performance:** No unnecessary re-renders or Impure functions (e.g., avoid Math.random in render).

## 🧪 Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated.
- [ ] Manual verification of the Auth flow.
- [ ] Verified theme switching (Light/Dark mode) integrity.
